title: CSS Custom Properties
description: Build a theme system using CSS custom properties (variables) that controls colors, spacing, and typography across a component
html:
Themed Component

This component uses CSS custom properties for all its styling values.
starterCss:
/* Define custom properties on :root and use them:
   --color-primary: #007bff
   --color-bg: #ffffff
   --color-text: #333333
   --spacing-md: 16px
   --radius: 8px
   Apply these variables throughout the card */

validationRules.message: Card background should use the --color-bg variable (white)

hints.text: CSS custom properties are declared with -- prefix and accessed with var(). Define them on :root for global scope.
Define variables on :root { --color-primary: #007bff; } then use them with var(--color-primary) in property values.
Define all variables on :root, then reference them with var() throughout the component styles.
hints.code:
:root { --color-primary: #007bff; --color-bg: #fff; --color-text: #333; --spacing-md: 16px; --radius: 8px; }
.themed-card { background: var(--color-bg); color: var(--color-text); padding: var(--spacing-md); border-radius: var(--radius); }
